TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ninel patungih kaku tu ninel u sakatalawan . namaka nu ayawan nu ninel, atu kaninelan , tu maminaninel tu sapitungih titaan. wiyni u ninel hananay hican amisananut.ŚÖ∂ŚĮ¶Ť¶ĀŤęáŚúįťúáÁöĄťė≤ÁĀĹ yadah ku sasakamun atu sakatineng atu sapisunanut. ayda musakamu kaku tu tatengaay a silsil nuayawan nu ninel ahican ku kawawŚúįťúáŚČćŤ¶ĀŚĀöÁöĄšļčśÉÖ uninel cakaw masausiay , nika kapah palasul, nika nipalasil ninel ninel nayi ku dadihingan , nika kapa palasul mikelul tu talaw sausi han ku sakatalawan bakahai ku cayay kasausi widasa ku kiliman "anu mahetik, maluyuh, mapeci'" a cacanan. sanutek han, atu mikelul ku nika laecus tu canan. sisa mipalasul tu sakabaluduh a kabang. anu maninel wica ku kawawŚúįťúáśôāŤ¶ĀŚĀöÁöĄšļčśÉÖ nayay ku sasakamun , kasenu han mikilim tu dadihingan. anu maninel saungay sa mangaleb ku katalawanŚúįťúáśôāŤ∂äÁßĽŚčēŤ∂äŚćĪťö™ tabakiay a huyahuy cay kakapah ku nitideng , tu hica a kapah ku muculil . sisa maduba mibuhat tu panan , mipaneng tu tinghuy , kasenun sa tahekal , umahiniay caay kaw kapahay . sisa hican amusikul ku tangah atu liel . tangah atu liel usabaeketay nu udip nu mita , amana padukayi , nikaudip idaw aca ku cacanan a lekakawaw malikelih tu ninel nika malecad tu " tidasamengmeng han , mana piisid , sikulen ku tangah atu liel". " sisa nuayawan a sapatanektek tu cacanan nisayadah kapah tu , imahini u kabiyalawan sa inayay tu. mamin namaninel awica ku kawawŚúįťúáŚĺĆŤ¶ĀŚĀöÁöĄšļčśÉÖ sakabilil han miadih anu mahica.Ť∂ēŚŅęÁĘļŤ™ćÁŹĺŚ†īŚģČŚÖ® u saudip nu tademaw ku kalihalawanŚõ†ÁāļšļļŚĎĹśĮĒŤľÉťáćŤ¶Ā sisa miadih tu tademaw anu mahica , miadih aca tu hekal. u ayaw sikulen henay ku udip kiya masikul ku taw sametekken henay ku udip , kiya misamwtek tu taw. usilsilsa " nuteken hanay ku udup, miadih tu taw a panetek , uhekal panutek" mikisa tu hekal sa , sinanuti mahetika ku palacal tu pabaw , ucuked , tu cacan , miadih idaw ku pahacengay a luyuh haw anu pahaceng ku kaliyuh mapela ku luma' cay kakapah imahini kiya keliden ku nisupedan a sapi kalamkam a kabang sakalam kam han miliyas tahekal atu tayda ikapahay a kakitidaan anu dawmiay asapi kinsa tu kaluyuh nu luma miadih tu pitiya mikilm tunu kanatal "kanatal ninel mikingkiway a kitidaan-luma maninel nu dikudan mikisa " sakinacacay han naku musakamu tu ninel nuyayawan nuteban nudikudan sapisinanut a lekakawaw atu silsil. ayda sayaway pasubana; tu malucekay a paduduce titaan .
S.PHON: nin…ôr~…ĺ patuŇčińß kaku tu nin…ôr~…ĺ u sakatar~…ĺawan . namaka nu ajawan nu nin…ôr~…ĺ, atu kanin…ôr~…ĺan , tu maminanin…ôr~…ĺ tu sapituŇčińß titaan. wijni u nin…ôr~…ĺ ńßananaj ńßi ¶an amisananut.********* jadańß ku sasakamun atu sakatin…ôŇč atu sapisunanut. ajda musakamu kaku tu tat…ôŇčaaj a sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ nuajawan nu nin…ôr~…ĺ ańßi ¶an ku kawaw******** unin…ôr~…ĺ ¶akaw masausiaj , nika kapańß par~…ĺasur~…ĺ, nika nipar~…ĺasir~…ĺ nin…ôr~…ĺ nin…ôr~…ĺ naji ku dadińßiŇčan , nika kapa par~…ĺasur~…ĺ mik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tar~…ĺaw sausi ńßan ku sakatar~…ĺawan bakańßai ku ¶ajaj kasausi widasa ku kir~…ĺiman "anu mańß…ôtik, mar~…ĺujuńß, map…ô ¶i Ē~ °" a ¶a ¶anan. sanut…ôk ńßan, atu mik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku nika r~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu ¶anan. sisa mipar~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu sakabar~…ĺuduńß a kabaŇč. anu manin…ôr~…ĺ wi ¶a ku kawaw******** najaj ku sasakamun , kas…ônu ńßan mikir~…ĺim tu dadińßiŇčan. anu manin…ôr~…ĺ sauŇčaj sa maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku katar~…ĺawan********* tabakiaj a ńßujańßuj ¶aj kakapańß ku nitid…ôŇč , tu ńßi ¶a a kapańß ku mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ . sisa maduba mibuńßat tu panan , mipan…ôŇč tu tiŇčńßuj , kas…ônun sa tańß…ôkar~…ĺ , umańßiniaj ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj . sisa ńßi ¶an amusikur~…ĺ ku taŇčańß atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ . taŇčańß atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ usaba…ôk…ôtaj nu udip nu mita , amana padukaji , nikaudip idaw a ¶a ku ¶a ¶anan a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺińß tu nin…ôr~…ĺ nika mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu " tidasam…ôŇčm…ôŇč ńßan , mana piisid , sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku taŇčańß atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ". " sisa nuajawan a sapatan…ôkt…ôk tu ¶a ¶anan nisajadańß kapańß tu , imańßini u kabijar~…ĺawan sa inajaj tu. mamin namanin…ôr~…ĺ awi ¶a ku kawaw******** sakabir~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßan miadińß anu mańßi ¶a.******** u saudip nu tad…ômaw ku kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺawan******** sisa miadińß tu tad…ômaw anu mańßi ¶a , miadińß a ¶a tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. u ajaw sikur~…ĺ…ôn ńß…ônaj ku udip kija masikur~…ĺ ku taw sam…ôt…ôkk…ôn ńß…ônaj ku udip , kija misamwt…ôk tu taw. usir~…ĺsir~…ĺsa " nut…ôk…ôn ńßanaj ku udup, miadińß tu taw a pan…ôt…ôk , uńß…ôkar~…ĺ panut…ôk" mikisa tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa , sinanuti mańß…ôtika ku par~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ tu pabaw , u ¶uk…ôd , tu ¶a ¶an , miadińß idaw ku pańßa ¶…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺujuńß ńßaw anu pańßa ¶…ôŇč ku kar~…ĺijuńß map…ôr~…ĺa ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aj kakapańß imańßini kija k…ôr~…ĺid…ôn ku nisup…ôdan a sapi kar~…ĺamkam a kabaŇč sakar~…ĺam kam ńßan mir~…ĺijas tańß…ôkar~…ĺ atu tajda ikapańßaj a kakitidaan anu dawmiaj asapi kinsa tu kar~…ĺujuńß nu r~…ĺuma miadińß tu pitija mikir~…ĺm tunu kanatar~…ĺ "kanatar~…ĺ nin…ôr~…ĺ mikiŇčkiwaj a kitidaan-r~…ĺuma manin…ôr~…ĺ nu dikudan mikisa " sakina ¶a ¶aj ńßan naku musakamu tu nin…ôr~…ĺ nujajawan nut…ôban nudikudan sapisinanut a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ. ajda sajawaj pasubana; tu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a padudu ¶…ô titaan .
S.FORM: ninel patungih kaku tu ninel u sakatalawan . namaka nu ayawan nu ninel, atu kaninelan , tu maminaninel tu sapitungih titaan. wiyni u ninel hananay hican amisananut.ŚÖ∂ŚĮ¶Ť¶ĀŤęáŚúįťúáÁöĄťė≤ÁĀĹ yadah ku sasakamun atu sakatineng atu sapisunanut. ayda musakamu kaku tu tatengaay a silsil nuayawan nu ninel ahican ku kawawŚúįťúáŚČćŤ¶ĀŚĀöÁöĄšļčśÉÖ uninel cakaw masausiay , nika kapah palasul, nika nipalasil ninel ninel nayi ku dadihingan , nika kapa palasul mikelul tu talaw sausi han ku sakatalawan bakahai ku cayay kasausi widasa ku kiliman "anu mahetik, maluyuh, mapeci'" a cacanan. sanutek han, atu mikelul ku nika laecus tu canan. sisa mipalasul tu sakabaluduh a kabang. anu maninel wica ku kawawŚúįťúáśôāŤ¶ĀŚĀöÁöĄšļčśÉÖ nayay ku sasakamun , kasenu han mikilim tu dadihingan. anu maninel saungay sa mangaleb ku katalawanŚúįťúáśôāŤ∂äÁßĽŚčēŤ∂äŚćĪťö™ tabakiay a huyahuy cay kakapah ku nitideng , tu hica a kapah ku muculil . sisa maduba mibuhat tu panan , mipaneng tu tinghuy , kasenun sa tahekal , umahiniay caay kaw kapahay . sisa hican amusikul ku tangah atu liel . tangah atu liel usabaeketay nu udip nu mita , amana padukayi , nikaudip idaw aca ku cacanan a lekakawaw malikelih tu ninel nika malecad tu " tidasamengmeng han , mana piisid , sikulen ku tangah atu liel". " sisa nuayawan a sapatanektek tu cacanan nisayadah kapah tu , imahini u kabiyalawan sa inayay tu. mamin namaninel awica ku kawawŚúįťúáŚĺĆŤ¶ĀŚĀöÁöĄšļčśÉÖ sakabilil han miadih anu mahica.Ť∂ēŚŅęÁĘļŤ™ćÁŹĺŚ†īŚģČŚÖ® u saudip nu tademaw ku kalihalawanŚõ†ÁāļšļļŚĎĹśĮĒŤľÉťáćŤ¶Ā sisa miadih tu tademaw anu mahica , miadih aca tu hekal. u ayaw sikulen henay ku udip kiya masikul ku taw sametekken henay ku udip , kiya misamwtek tu taw. usilsilsa " nuteken hanay ku udup, miadih tu taw a panetek , uhekal panutek" mikisa tu hekal sa , sinanuti mahetika ku palacal tu pabaw , ucuked , tu cacan , miadih idaw ku pahacengay a luyuh haw anu pahaceng ku kaliyuh mapela ku luma' cay kakapah imahini kiya keliden ku nisupedan a sapi kalamkam a kabang sakalam kam han miliyas tahekal atu tayda ikapahay a kakitidaan anu dawmiay asapi kinsa tu kaluyuh nu luma miadih tu pitiya mikilm tunu kanatal "kanatal ninel mikingkiway a kitidaan-luma maninel nu dikudan mikisa " sakinacacay han naku musakamu tu ninel nuyayawan nuteban nudikudan sapisinanut a lekakawaw atu silsil. ayda sayaway pasubana; tu malucekay a paduduce titaan .
S.PHON: nin…ôr~…ĺ patuŇčińß kaku tu nin…ôr~…ĺ u sakatar~…ĺawan . namaka nu ajawan nu nin…ôr~…ĺ, atu kanin…ôr~…ĺan , tu maminanin…ôr~…ĺ tu sapituŇčińß titaan. wijni u nin…ôr~…ĺ ńßananaj ńßi ¶an amisananut.********* jadańß ku sasakamun atu sakatin…ôŇč atu sapisunanut. ajda musakamu kaku tu tat…ôŇčaaj a sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ nuajawan nu nin…ôr~…ĺ ańßi ¶an ku kawaw******** unin…ôr~…ĺ ¶akaw masausiaj , nika kapańß par~…ĺasur~…ĺ, nika nipar~…ĺasir~…ĺ nin…ôr~…ĺ nin…ôr~…ĺ naji ku dadińßiŇčan , nika kapa par~…ĺasur~…ĺ mik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tar~…ĺaw sausi ńßan ku sakatar~…ĺawan bakańßai ku ¶ajaj kasausi widasa ku kir~…ĺiman "anu mańß…ôtik, mar~…ĺujuńß, map…ô ¶i Ē~ °" a ¶a ¶anan. sanut…ôk ńßan, atu mik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku nika r~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu ¶anan. sisa mipar~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu sakabar~…ĺuduńß a kabaŇč. anu manin…ôr~…ĺ wi ¶a ku kawaw******** najaj ku sasakamun , kas…ônu ńßan mikir~…ĺim tu dadińßiŇčan. anu manin…ôr~…ĺ sauŇčaj sa maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku katar~…ĺawan********* tabakiaj a ńßujańßuj ¶aj kakapańß ku nitid…ôŇč , tu ńßi ¶a a kapańß ku mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ . sisa maduba mibuńßat tu panan , mipan…ôŇč tu tiŇčńßuj , kas…ônun sa tańß…ôkar~…ĺ , umańßiniaj ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj . sisa ńßi ¶an amusikur~…ĺ ku taŇčańß atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ . taŇčańß atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ usaba…ôk…ôtaj nu udip nu mita , amana padukaji , nikaudip idaw a ¶a ku ¶a ¶anan a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺińß tu nin…ôr~…ĺ nika mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu " tidasam…ôŇčm…ôŇč ńßan , mana piisid , sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku taŇčańß atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ". " sisa nuajawan a sapatan…ôkt…ôk tu ¶a ¶anan nisajadańß kapańß tu , imańßini u kabijar~…ĺawan sa inajaj tu. mamin namanin…ôr~…ĺ awi ¶a ku kawaw******** sakabir~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßan miadińß anu mańßi ¶a.******** u saudip nu tad…ômaw ku kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺawan******** sisa miadińß tu tad…ômaw anu mańßi ¶a , miadińß a ¶a tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. u ajaw sikur~…ĺ…ôn ńß…ônaj ku udip kija masikur~…ĺ ku taw sam…ôt…ôkk…ôn ńß…ônaj ku udip , kija misamwt…ôk tu taw. usir~…ĺsir~…ĺsa " nut…ôk…ôn ńßanaj ku udup, miadińß tu taw a pan…ôt…ôk , uńß…ôkar~…ĺ panut…ôk" mikisa tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa , sinanuti mańß…ôtika ku par~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ tu pabaw , u ¶uk…ôd , tu ¶a ¶an , miadińß idaw ku pańßa ¶…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺujuńß ńßaw anu pańßa ¶…ôŇč ku kar~…ĺijuńß map…ôr~…ĺa ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aj kakapańß imańßini kija k…ôr~…ĺid…ôn ku nisup…ôdan a sapi kar~…ĺamkam a kabaŇč sakar~…ĺam kam ńßan mir~…ĺijas tańß…ôkar~…ĺ atu tajda ikapańßaj a kakitidaan anu dawmiaj asapi kinsa tu kar~…ĺujuńß nu r~…ĺuma miadińß tu pitija mikir~…ĺm tunu kanatar~…ĺ "kanatar~…ĺ nin…ôr~…ĺ mikiŇčkiwaj a kitidaan-r~…ĺuma manin…ôr~…ĺ nu dikudan mikisa " sakina ¶a ¶aj ńßan naku musakamu tu nin…ôr~…ĺ nujajawan nut…ôban nudikudan sapisinanut a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ. ajda sajawaj pasubana; tu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a padudu ¶…ô titaan .
